news.title: Microsoft, OpenAI end exclusivity agreement
news.description: Microsoft and OpenAI have agreed to drop the software giant's exclusive right to sell the startup's AI models, opening the door for the ChatGPT maker to pursue deals with cloud-computing rivals like Amazon.

news.title: ‘The cost of compute is far beyond the costs of the employees’: Nvidia executive says right now AI is more expensive than paying human workers
‘The cost of compute is far beyond the costs of the employees’: Nvidia executive says right now AI is more expensive than paying human workers
news.description: Big Tech has announced $740 billion in capex this year, but AI has yet to show evidence of widespread increased productivity.

news.title: Your LLM issues are really data issues
news.description: Ryan welcomes Harsha Chintalapani, co-founder and CTO at Collate and co-creator of Open Metadata, to the show to discuss why AI and LLMs struggle with real-time, structured production data.

news.title: Nvidia says GPU allocation follows first-come, first-served principle, not highest bidder
news.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang clarified in an April 2026 interview with Silicon Valley podcast host Dwarkesh Patel that the company allocates GPUs based on a first-come, first-served principle rather than a highest bidder wins approach.

news.title: Japan's Government Panel Moves to Protect Voices From Unauthorized Generative AI Use
